message.content:
@startuml
title AnisotropyType Referenced-by View

skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor #FFD700
skinparam classBorderColor #000000

package "work-product-component Entities" {
  class "VelocityModeling" as VM <<work-product-component>> {
    AnisotropyType
  }
}

skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor<<Abstraction>> #87CEEB
  BorderColor<<Abstraction>> #4682B4
  BackgroundColor<<reference-data>> #40E0D0
  BorderColor<<reference-data>> #008B8B
}

class "AbstractReferenceType" as ART <<Abstraction>>
class "AnisotropyType" as AT <<reference-data>>

VM --> AT
AT --|> ART

note top of VM
C
end note

note top of AT
C
end note

note top of ART
A
end note

@enduml
